context: Tests whether the agent implements the documented secret-key rotation procedure in order, gates on an explicit confirmation string, never logs the secret key, and short-circuits on the first failure.

checklist.name: Confirmation gate
checklist.description: Function checks input.confirmRotation === 'yes-rotate-' + input.environment before any side-effectful step; short-circuits with ok: false on mismatch

checklist.name: Steps run in documented order
checklist.description: Audit entries are appended in the order: confirmed → server-secret-store-updated → re-grant-tokens → verify → audit-secrets-access

checklist.name: Calls reissueTokens
checklist.description: Function invokes input.reissueTokens() and records the returned count in the audit detail

checklist.name: Calls verifyToken
checklist.description: Function invokes input.verifyToken() and short-circuits with ok: false when it returns false

checklist.name: Calls auditSecretManagerAccess
checklist.description: Function invokes input.auditSecretManagerAccess() as the final step and includes the returned principals in the audit detail

checklist.name: Secret key never logged
checklist.description: Code never assigns input.newSecretKey (or any computed value derived from it) into any audit entry, console.log call, or return value

checklist.name: Short-circuit on failure
checklist.description: Each step that can fail short-circuits subsequent steps and returns { ok: false, audit } rather than continuing

checklist.name: Top-of-file comment all three points
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states all three: (1) server-only, (2) new secret key value is never written to audit, (3) runbook short-circuits on first failure
